archimate:ApplicationService.name: Learning Platform System
archimate:ApplicationService.documentation:
Definition: A Learning Platform System is a software application service that provides a comprehensive platform for managing and delivering learning content and experiences. It enables organizations to create, manage, and deliver various types of learning materials, such as courses, training modules, assessments, and educational resources. The Learning Platform System typically includes features such as content authoring, learner management, progress tracking, assessment tools, discussion forums, and collaboration capabilities. It supports both self-paced and instructor-led learning, fostering employee or user development, knowledge acquisition, and skill enhancement. The Learning Platform System application service facilitates efficient and effective learning experiences, enabling organizations to deliver training and educational programs in a centralized and scalable manner.
Source: Gartner
Source reference: https://www.gartner.com/en/documents/4002299
LOST view: TVA-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/LearningPlatformSystemApplicationService
ABB name: egovera:LearningPlatformSystemApplicationService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/LearningPlatformSystemApplicationService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalWorkplaceApplicationService

properties.value: A Learning Platform System is a software application service that provides a comprehensive platform for managing and delivering learning content and experiences. It enables organizations to create, manage, and deliver various types of learning materials, such as courses, training modules, assessments, and educational resources. The Learning Platform System typically includes features such as content authoring, learner management, progress tracking, assessment tools, discussion forums, and collaboration capabilities. It supports both self-paced and instructor-led learning, fostering employee or user development, knowledge acquisition, and skill enhancement. The Learning Platform System application service facilitates efficient and effective learning experiences, enabling organizations to deliver training and educational programs in a centralized and scalable manner.
